sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78130" key="parakatesqi/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακατ-εσθίω</orth>, <sense id="n78130.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat with</tr_> something else, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0505.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sotad.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
